name: Atrial Fibrillation Episode Detection Positive Predictive Value
description: This metric quantifies the proportion of detected atrial fibrillation episodes that are true positives, with reported values of 95–96% in the referenced pacemaker. It reflects the reliability of arrhythmia detection and directly influences clinical decision-making by minimizing unnecessary interventions. Its accuracy is constrained by device sensing capabilities and the specificity of detection algorithms.
